variants.headline: Offer Abhishekam Seva this Janmashtami 🙏
variants.body: Sponsor the sacred Maha Abhishekam of Sri Krishna. Your seva from ₹2,100. 80G benefits.

variants.headline: Be part of Sri Krishna Janmashtami
variants.body: Join thousands of devotees. Sponsor festival seva and receive prasadam at your home.

variants.headline: Krishna is appearing — will you welcome Him?
variants.body: Special Abhishekam sponsorship ₹11,000 with certificate & prasadam.

variants.headline: Vrindavan Kartik Yatra 2026
variants.body: Walk the sacred land of Krishna this Kartik. Early-bird ₹18,000 all-inclusive. Limited seats.

variants.headline: Protect the sacred cows 🐄
variants.body: Your Gau Seva feeds and shelters Krishna's beloved cows. Sponsor a cow from ₹5,100/month.
